metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4641
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1. Immunofluorescence and confocal microscopy showed Netrin-1 co-localized with PSD95 and VGLUT1 in mouse cultured cortical neurons at DIV21.

note; data resolution is not sufficient to pinpoint the subcellular localization to within pre/post-synapse (or both), hence the annotation against more general "synapse" term.

"To determine the proportion of synapses containing netrin-1 or DCC in vivo, we stained for netrin-1 and DCC in conjunction with presynaptic and postsynaptic markers in histological sections prepared from 21-d-old mouse (Fig. 1k,l). Staining for netrin-1 and DCC overlaps substantially with excitatory synapses. These findings indicate that readily detectable levels of netrin-1 and DCC are present at excitatory synapses in the rat and mouse cortex during the developmental period of synaptogenesis.". Experimental description: "For Fig. 1, k and l, P21 mouse brain was fixed by ..."

rat anti-netrin-1 (R&D Systems)
